diff: This document contains a Directory of all prospective Instances of the Market Cap Fee Primitive whose Invocation is currently in progress. Invocations that are completed successfully are moved to [A.6.1.1.8.2.3.2.1.2 Active Instances Directory](524d791c-8402-4d2a-ab42-e06c3dd5caef), whereas failed Invocations are Archived in [A.6.1.1.8.2.3.2.1.5 - Hub Data Repository](527bf1a7-eff1-423d-af04-19b76dd33798).
